frictions.description: VAL-DATA-004 test initially used 'exp_test_9999' naming pattern which doesn't match the data_loader regex (only exp_NNNN and exp_lme_NNNN accepted). Had to use 'exp_9999' and 'exp_lme_9999' instead. This is by design — the loader enforces strict naming patterns.
frictions.resolution: Used correct experiment naming patterns (exp_9999, exp_9998, exp_lme_9999) for temporary test directories.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all passed. VAL-DATA-002 (missing results.json): 4 experiments with no_results status correctly handled. VAL-DATA-003 (missing params/hypothesis): empty dict and empty string fallbacks work. VAL-DATA-004 (malformed JSON): parse_error status with error message preserved for both results.json and params.json. VAL-DATA-005 (validation_failed): all metrics null, error preserved with decay reference.
